title: Wingstop

Wing-focused chain. The gold-standard high-anabolic scoring chain in the dataset — Classic Wings deliver 10g protein for 90–120 cal across all 13 flavors. Captured at 3:10 a.m. on 2025-07-18, between the Chipotle and Taco Bell scrapes.
